case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. VS. ANNE K. VROLYK et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-12-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ANNE VROLYK'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, NA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS is off calendar. Matter re-calendared to be heard in department 610. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Plaintiff Citibank South Dakora, N.A.'S Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions (Reservation Made For Discovery)
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Citibank South Dakora's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $240, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Plaintiff Citibank South Dakota, N.A.'S Motion To Establish Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions (Reserved For Discovery)
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Citibank South Dakota's Motion To Establish Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's Requests For Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $240, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
